source_depth_status: source-backed draft; strong broad-source base but not mature until figure review is completed

sources.title: Nontraumatic Intracranial Hemorrhage - Diseases of the Brain, Head and Neck, Spine 2024-2027
sources.source_type: NCBI Bookshelf / Springer diagnostic imaging chapter
sources.notes: Primary broad imaging source for CT/CTA initial assessment, MRI etiology characterization, intraparenchymal hemorrhage timing, edema, complications, and etiologic clues.

sources.title: Intracerebral Hemorrhagic Stroke - StatPearls - NCBI Bookshelf
sources.notes: Used for broad ICH clinical imaging context, noncontrast CT role, and serial MRI hemoglobin degradation patterns.

sources.title: ACR Appropriateness Criteria: Cerebrovascular Diseases-Stroke and Stroke-Related Conditions
sources.notes: Used for broad imaging appropriateness and stroke-related hemorrhage context.

sources.title: 2022 Guideline for the Management of Patients With Spontaneous Intracerebral Hemorrhage
sources.notes: Used only for high-level guideline context and management-pathway framing; disease chapter does not make patient-level treatment recommendations.

sources.title: Intracerebral hemorrhage - Radiopaedia
sources.notes: Used as radiology-facing support for location categories, CT hyperdense hematoma, edema, complications, and MRI etiologic clues.

sources.title: Hemorrhage on MRI - Radiopaedia
sources.notes: Used for MRI blood-product appearance and caution that hemorrhage dating is sequence- and context-dependent.

sources.title: Intracranial hemorrhage: principles of CT and MRI interpretation
sources.notes: Used for CT/MRI interpretation principles. PubMed page was browser-challenge accessible in this environment, so record as URL-only.

sources.title: The Boston criteria version 2.0 for cerebral amyloid angiopathy
sources.notes: Used for CAA-related lobar hemorrhage context and MRI marker language, not as a general ICH source.

sources.title: Neuroradiological Findings in Cerebral Amyloid Angiopathy with a Particular Consideration of the Boston Criteria 2.0
sources.notes: Used for lobar hemorrhage and CAA imaging marker context; not used to generalize all cerebral hemorrhage etiology.

sources.title: Imaging of Spontaneous Intracerebral Hemorrhage
sources.notes: High-value imaging review for spontaneous ICH; includes SMASH-U, NCCT/CTA/MRI, expansion, and etiology workup.

sources.title: Imaging of Intracranial Hemorrhage
sources.notes: Broad review of CT and MRI appearances of intracranial hemorrhage and blood-product evolution.

sources.title: Susceptibility-weighted imaging in intracranial hemorrhage: not all bleeds are black
sources.notes: Supports SWI interpretation and the caution that low signal on SWI is not always blood.

sources.title: Susceptibility weighted imaging: Clinical applications and future directions
sources.notes: Useful for SWI sensitivity, microbleeds, cavernous malformations, calcification, and tumor hemorrhage context.

sources.title: Intracerebral haemorrhage
sources.notes: Broad clinical/imaging review with classic ICH course, edema, expansion, and prognosis context.

sources.title: Hemorrhagic Stroke: Intracerebral Hemorrhage
sources.notes: Useful for typical hypertensive, lobar, and intraventricular hemorrhage locations and CT workup.

sources.title: Clinical Applications of the CT Angiography Spot Sign in Acute Intracerebral Hemorrhage: A Review
sources.notes: Supports spot sign definition, scoring, timing, and expansion risk context.

sources.title: Non-contrast-CT Markers of Intracerebral Hemorrhage-expansion
sources.notes: Supports noncontrast CT markers when CTA is not available.

sources.title: Systematic Characterization of the Computed Tomography Angiography Spot Sign in Primary Intracerebral Hemorrhage
sources.notes: Supports spot sign scoring and expansion prediction; use as study-level evidence.

sources.title: The accuracy of spot sign in predicting hematoma expansion after intracerebral hemorrhage
sources.notes: Systematic review/meta-analysis of CTA spot sign accuracy.

sources.title: Predictive Value of CTA Spot Sign on Hematoma Expansion in Intracerebral Hemorrhage Patients
sources.notes: Supports dynamic spot sign interpretation and expansion risk.

sources.title: MRI spot sign: Gadolinium contrast extravasation in an expanding intracerebral hematoma on MRI
sources.notes: Case-level source for MRI-visible active extravasation; do not generalize broadly.

sources.title: The accuracy of spot sign in predicting hematoma expansion after intracerebral hemorrhage - DARE review record
sources.notes: NCBI DARE record for spot-sign meta-analysis provenance.

sources.title: Cerebral Amyloid Angiopathy - StatPearls - NCBI Bookshelf
sources.notes: Textbook-style CAA source supporting lobar hemorrhage, microbleeds, superficial siderosis, and differential workup.

sources.title: Neuroradiological Findings in Cerebral Amyloid Angiopathy with a Particular Consideration of the Boston Criteria 2.0
sources.notes: High-value imaging review for CAA-related hemorrhage and Boston Criteria 2.0 markers.

sources.title: Diagnosis of Cerebral Amyloid Angiopathy: Evolution of the Boston Criteria
sources.notes: Supports evolution of CAA diagnostic criteria and imaging marker interpretation.

sources.title: The ABCs of measuring intracerebral hemorrhage volumes
sources.notes: Classic source for ABC/2 hematoma volume estimation.

sources.title: ABC/2: estimating intracerebral haemorrhage volume and total brain volume, and predicting outcome in children
sources.notes: Use for pediatric/narrow extension of ABC/2 measurement context.

sources.title: Guidelines for Neuroprognostication in Critically Ill Adults with Intracerebral Hemorrhage
sources.notes: Neurocritical care guideline for prognostication; useful for outcome language and claim boundaries.

sources.title: Clinical and Radiographic Predictors of Intracerebral Hemorrhage Outcome
sources.notes: Supports radiographic predictors such as location, volume, expansion, IVH, hydrocephalus, and edema.

sources.title: Prediction and Observation of Post-Admission Hematoma Expansion in Patients with Intracerebral Hemorrhage
sources.notes: Supports serial imaging, delayed IVH, and hematoma expansion observation.

sources.title: Diagnosis of intracerebral hemorrhage - Stroke Manual
sources.notes: Practical diagnostic workflow for ICH, including CT/MRI appearance, CTA, DSA, and repeat imaging.

sources.title: Intracerebral hemorrhage - Radiopaedia
sources.notes: Radiology reference for ICH terminology, location, CT/MRI appearance, and complications.

sources.title: Hyperacute intracerebral haemorrhage on MRI and CT - Radiopaedia case
sources.notes: Case-level visual support for hyperacute thalamic hemorrhage with intraventricular extension.

sources.title: Computed tomography in acute intracerebral hemorrhage: neuroimaging predictors of hematoma expansion and outcome
sources.notes: Open educational review of CT predictors of expansion and outcome.

sources.title: Intracranial Hemorrhage Evaluation With MRI
sources.notes: Practical MRI blood-product evolution source; secondary reference.

sources.title: The Radiology Assistant: Non-traumatic Intracranial Hemorrhage
sources.notes: Radiology teaching source for nontraumatic ICH approach and etiologic search.

sources.title: Neurocritical Care Society Guidelines
sources.notes: Professional society guideline index; use for source discovery and current guideline context.

sources.title: Intraventricular Hemorrhage in Adults
sources.notes: Supports IVH complication context through ICH review material; use cautiously if not a dedicated IVH source.

sources.title: Cerebral cavernous malformations and hemorrhage imaging context
sources.notes: Use as supporting SWI/cavernoma context, not as broad cavernoma guideline.

sources.title: SWI mimics of hemorrhage and calcification context
sources.notes: Supports caution that susceptibility signal can reflect calcification or other non-hemorrhagic processes.

sources.title: SMASH-U etiologic classification context from spontaneous ICH imaging review
sources.notes: Use for etiologic categorization: structural lesion, medication, amyloid, systemic, hypertension, undetermined.

sources.title: ICH outcome predictors: hematoma volume, location, IVH, hydrocephalus
sources.notes: Use for endpoint and covariate design; duplicate URL kept as separate extracted claim family.

sources.title: Perihematomal edema and ICH outcome context
sources.notes: Use for edema endpoint and temporal-confounder context.

sources.title: Hematoma expansion and delayed intraventricular extension context
sources.notes: Use for serial imaging and delayed-complication evidence.

sources.title: Noncontrast CT hypodensity and heterogeneous density markers in ICH
sources.notes: Use for blend sign, black hole sign, island sign, and hypodensity markers.

sources.title: CTA contrast extravasation and spot sign terminology context
sources.notes: Use for terminology distinction between CTA spot sign and delayed contrast extravasation.

sources.title: MRI signal evolution of intracranial hemorrhage on SWI and conventional MRI
sources.notes: Use for sequence-specific report language around blood-product age.

sources.title: CAA microbleed and superficial siderosis imaging marker context
sources.notes: Use for CAA-related lobar hemorrhage differential and MR-RATE microbleed contrast.

sources.title: Intracerebral hemorrhage - Osmosis
sources.notes: Useful learner-facing explanation; not primary authority.

sources.title: Imaging intracranial hemorrhage - Learn Neuroradiology
sources.notes: High-value neuroradiology teaching hub for hemorrhage appearance, evolution, and causes.
